chart.prompt: Anzahl Versandbelege pro Kalenderwoche, gruppiert nach Carrier (shipping_method), letzte 8 Wochen, gestapelt
chart.sql_string:
SELECT 
  TO_CHAR(dn.date, 'YYYY-WW') AS "Kalenderwoche",
  dn.shipping_method AS "Carrier",
  COUNT(dn.delivery_note_id) AS "Anzahl_Versandbelege"
FROM delivery_notes dn
WHERE dn.date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '56 days'
  AND dn.shipping_method IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(dn.date, 'YYYY-WW'), dn.shipping_method
ORDER BY TO_CHAR(dn.date, 'YYYY-WW') ASC, dn.shipping_method ASC

en.title: Shipments by carrier (weekly)
en.description: Weekly shipments stacked by carrier over the last eight weeks — shifts in carrier mix become obvious.

de.title: Versand pro Woche & Carrier
de.description: Wöchentliche Versandmenge gestapelt nach Carrier der letzten 8 Wochen — Verschiebungen im Carrier-Mix werden offensichtlich.
